channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Polypharmacy is associated with higher risk of mortality and hospitalizations among older adults
item.description: 1. Polypharmacy was associated with a higher risk of mortality and hospitalization at one-year and five-years among older adults aged >75 years. Evide...

item.title: Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.

item.title: Prostate RT Linked to High Rate of Late Urinary Toxicities
item.description: A recent prospective study highlights the substantial burden of late RT-related genitourinary complications among men with prostate cancer. Medscape M...

item.title: Smokefree generation law could see English smoking prevalence drop below 5% decades earlier than expected

item.title: Northern California reports first measles outbreak since 2020
item.description: California reported its first confirmed measles outbreak since 2020 on Feb. 10. The highly contagious disease infected 2,276 people nationwide in 2025...

item.title: How Do Consultation Frequencies Vary for Older Adults?

item.title: Depression Linked to Cognitive Burden in Epilepsy
item.description: More severe depressive symptoms are associated with greater cognitive burden in epilepsy, even after considering seizure and epileptiform abnormality ...

item.title: Study finds addiction consults led to opioid treatment for eye infection patients

item.title: 'Dancing molecules' paralysis treatment heals lab-grown human spinal cord organoids
